overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dystopian industrial urban district during golden hour. The player moves from a back alley onto a city street, passing by futuristic vehicles, industrial structures, and NPCs, with the setting sun casting long orange shadows across the concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with garage doors

events.description: exits narrow industrial alley onto main city street with traffic

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow industrial alley and emerging onto a city street sidewalk

entered.detail: large industrial building with metal roll-up garage doors
construction barricades with alternating yellow and red stripes
multi-lane city street with vehicle traffic
network of electrical wires and cables spanning between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial alley with concrete ground and garage buildings. The player walks forward past yellow and red construction barricades, transitioning from the enclosed alley onto a city street sidewalk with the asphalt road becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with industrial buildings

events.description: red sports car drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing by industrial structures

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past quickly on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: silver metal railing running along the edge of an elevated walkway or platform
large industrial building with corrugated metal siding and multiple levels
large illuminated advertisement screen visible in the distance above the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk next to a multi-lane road, with industrial warehouses and metal railings on the right. A red sports car speeds past on the road to the left, and a large digital billboard becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pedestrians and prominent landmark building

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall building with '12' sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and looking up at a tall landmark building with a glowing '12' sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large illuminated '12' sign near the top, visible against the sunset sky
massive digital advertisement screen showing animated content on a tall pole structure

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians walking in both directions. The camera approaches a prominent tall building with a glowing '12' sign on the left, and the player looks up at it. A large digital billboard stands in the center of the view, displaying advertisements against the orange sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with overhead pipes and billboard structures

events.description: passes under the large billboard structure, entering a more industrial section

agents.ego_description: walking down an industrial sidewalk toward the setting sun, passing under large billboard structures and alongside metal railings

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the sunset

entered.detail: large billboard structure extending over the sidewalk with support beams
network of large industrial pipes and cylindrical tanks attached to buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through a more industrial section of the city with large pipes and cylindrical structures on the left. The camera passes under a massive billboard structure extending over the sidewalk. The setting sun creates a bright orange glow at the end of the street ahead, with the industrial corridor stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined industrial alleyway into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban corridor. It begins by navigating past construction barricades in a narrow concrete alley before emerging onto a city sidewalk where a multi-lane road opens up to the left. As the camera moves forward, a red sports car speeds past and the environment becomes more populated with pedestrians, shifting the focus toward a tall building with a glowing sign and a massive digital billboard set against an orange sky. The scene then transitions into a heavier industrial zone characterized by large pipes and cylindrical structures, passing beneath a towering overhead billboard. Finally, the camera pushes forward through this industrial corridor toward a bright, golden glow where the setting sun illuminates the distant end of the street.
